title: Hawksbill A4 Card Paper White 225GSM 100 Pack Premium Cardstock for Arts Craft Home and Office Use
features: PREMIUM A4 CARD STOCK: This 100 pack of white card from Hawksbill Paper is 225 grams per square metre (GSM) in weight. Thanks to the smooth finish, this durable card enables easy gliding of ballpoint or ink pens onto the paper due to the lack of friction, making this product suitable for calligraphy projects while ensuring neat handwriting.

A4 PAPER FOR OFFICE & HOME PRINTING: 225 GSM is a high-quality thickness for card, ideal for printing brochures, leaflets, invitations or certificates. It is compatible with inkjet, laser and industrial printers. The paper is smooth – the ink will not be absorbed or bleed so text and images will come out crisp and clear, so you have perfect printouts every time, even when double-sided printing. Ensure you monitor the printer when in use as some printers may not accept card.

GREAT FOR HOBBY ARTS & CRAFTING: 225 GSM A4 card is a versatile, strong thickness and is considered quality card. We would recommend this A4 craft card for hands-on crafting such as making stationery and greeting cards or even for sketching with pencil, marker pens, acrylic, watercolours, gouache, charcoal, pastels, gel pens, fine liners or calligraphy inks. Hawksbill Paper has been long considered for art aficionados and craft lovers.

PREMIUM CREATIVE ACTIVITY CARD FOR KIDS: You might see a blank piece of card, but your child will see a sheet on which to be inventive. 225 GSM is great for making cards for Easter, Christmas or birthdays together by sticking, drawing and painting. High GSM card can be tricky for kids to cut out so please ensure a grown-up is present. Make memories creating with your loved ones while they are young – show them how fun it is to craft on rainy days while off mobile phones!

OVER 90 YEARS’ EXCELLENCE IN THE PAPER TRADE: Hawksbill Paper is an FSC-accredited family business which has been dealing in the UK paper trade for nearly a century. Our company is a mark of true quality paper; we travel worldwide to source the right paper for your home and office needs. We offer a range of A3 and A4 paper products available in many colours, sizes and pack quantities as well as our new poster paper and kraft wrapping paper.
